# ASImportableCredential.TOTP

**Structure**

A type to represent a time-based one-time password generator (TOTP).

## Declaration

```swift
struct TOTP
```

## Overview

This type is a representation of `TOTP` as defined in the Credential Exchange Format (CXF) specification.

## Accessing TOTP properties

- **secret**: The secret associated with this generator.
- **period**: The period, in seconds, used by the generator to refresh codes.
- **digits**: The number of digits in the code used by the generator.
- **algorithm**: The algorithm used by the generator.
- **ASImportableCredential.TOTP.Algorithm**: An enumeration of algorithm types that all importers are expected to support.
- **issuer**: The issuer of the generator, if any.

## Initializers

- **init(secret:period:digits:userName:algorithm:issuer:)**

## Instance Properties

- **userName**: The user name associated with the generator. When instantiating from JSON, this property will be populated from the “username” field.

## Login credential types

- **ASImportableCredential.basicAuthentication(_:)**: A password credential.
- **ASImportableCredential.BasicAuthentication**: A type to represent a basic authentication password.
- **ASImportableCredential.passkey(_:)**: A passkey credential.
- **ASImportableCredential.Passkey**: A type to represent a passkey credential.
- **ASImportableCredential.totp(_:)**: A time-based one-time password (TOTP) credential.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
